title: The Java Ecosystem: From Code to Execution
description: A high-level overview of the key components involved in writing, compiling, and running a Java program, highlighting the role of the JVM and platform independence.
relationships: Java Source Code is compiled by the Java Compiler into platform-independent Java Bytecode
Java Bytecode is executed by the Java Virtual Machine (JVM)
The JVM, specific to an Operating System, interprets the bytecode and interacts with the underlying Hardware
